events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: Queen's legendary guitarist, singer, and songwriter Sir Brian May was born on July 19, 1947.

angles.name: Guitar God
angles.copy: Celebrating the iconic Brian May, who turns 79 today. His guitar riffs with Queen are truly legendary.

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: The Rolling Stones' charismatic frontman Mick Jagger was born on July 26, 1943.

angles.name: Rock & Roll Icon
angles.copy: An incredible 83 years young for Mick Jagger today! The energy he brings to the stage is still unmatched.

events.title: MTV launched (1981)
events.blurb: MTV, originally an initialism of Music Television, launched on August 1, 1981, with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star' as its first video.

angles.name: Video Killed The Radio Star
angles.copy: 45 years ago today, MTV launched and changed the music world forever. And yes, the first video was 'Video Killed The Radio Star'!

events.title: Oasis released Definitely Maybe (1994)
events.blurb: Oasis released their debut album 'Definitely Maybe' on August 29, 1994.

angles.name: Britpop Classic
angles.copy: A quarter-century ago, Oasis dropped 'Definitely Maybe'. Still sounds as fresh and vital today. What's your favourite track?

events.title: Woodstock Festival took place (1969)
events.blurb: The legendary Woodstock Music & Art Fair took place from August 15-18, 1969, in Bethel, New York.

angles.name: Three Days of Peace & Music
angles.copy: 57 years since half a million gathered for three days of peace, love, and music at Woodstock. A truly iconic moment in history.

events.title: Anniversary of Elvis Presley's death
events.blurb: Elvis Presley passed away on August 16, 1977, and would have been 91 this year.

angles.name: Remembering The King
angles.copy: Remembering the King of Rock and Roll, Elvis Presley, who we lost on this day in 1977. His legacy lives on.

events.title: The Beatles released Abbey Road (1969)
events.blurb: The Beatles' iconic album 'Abbey Road' was released on September 26, 1969, featuring the famous zebra crossing cover.

angles.name: Iconic Album Cover
angles.copy: 57 years since The Beatles gave us 'Abbey Road' and that legendary album cover. Still inspiring pilgrimages to that zebra crossing!

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: The Pretenders' formidable frontwoman Chrissie Hynde was born on September 7, 1951.

angles.name: Rock & Roll Rebel
angles.copy: Happy 75th Birthday to the one and only Chrissie Hynde! A true rock and roll rebel and icon.

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: Oasis and Beady Eye frontman, and successful solo artist, Liam Gallagher was born on September 21, 1972.

angles.name: Rock Star Birthday
angles.copy: Our Kid turns 54 today! Happy Birthday to the legendary Liam Gallagher. What's your favourite Liam moment?

events.title: John Lennon released Imagine (1971)
events.blurb: John Lennon's seminal album 'Imagine' was released on October 8, 1971, in the UK and October 11, 1971, in the US.

angles.name: Imagine Peace
angles.copy: 55 years since John Lennon released the timeless anthem 'Imagine'. A message of peace that still resonates today.

events.title: Apple released the first iPod (2001)
events.blurb: Apple unveiled the first iPod on October 23, 2001, and it was released on November 10, 2001, revolutionizing portable music.

angles.name: Pocket Full of Music
angles.copy: Remember when you could fit '1,000 songs in your pocket'? 25 years ago, Apple launched the original iPod and changed everything.

events.title: James Bond Day
events.blurb: October 5th marks James Bond Day, celebrating the release of the first 007 film, 'Dr. No', in 1962.

angles.name: Shaken, Not Stirred
angles.copy: Happy James Bond Day! Celebrating over six decades of 007. What's your favourite Bond film or theme song?

events.title: John Lennon would have been 86
events.blurb: The iconic co-founder of The Beatles, John Lennon, was born on October 9, 1940.

angles.name: Remembering a Legend
angles.copy: On what would have been his 86th birthday, we remember the unparalleled talent and vision of John Lennon.

events.title: John Cleese turns 87
events.blurb: The legendary British comedian, actor, and writer John Cleese was born on October 27, 1939.

angles.name: Comedy Genius
angles.copy: Sending huge birthday wishes to the utterly brilliant John Cleese, who turns 87 today! What's your favourite Monty Python or Fawlty Towers moment?
